purpose: Example recovery bootstrap display data for resuming orchestration review without launching tasks or changing state.

last_known_orchestration_state.git_state: UNKNOWN until operator runs git status --short --branch

unfinished_packets.next_step: Run the read-only recovery bootstrap display and review the output.

pending_approvals.notes: No commit or push is allowed without a separate explicit prompt.

recovery_next_action.action: Review this display output, run validation, then decide whether to approve a separate selective commit prompt.
recovery_next_action.stop_condition: Stop if the display reports missing or invalid bootstrap data.

safety_notes: No startup tasks or scheduled tasks are created.
No broker, OANDA, API keys, webhooks, real orders, or live trading.
No files are launched from this display.
